title: getDSPInstance
text: getDSPInstance Returns a reference to the uniface.Instance object that represents a given component instance name on the browser. Deprecated. Important: The function getDSPInstance is deprecated. Use getInstance instead. For more information, see getInstance() . uniface.getDSPInstance ( { InstanceName } ) Arguments InstanceName Name of a component instance; optional Return value If an instance name was specified, this function returns a reference to the named uniface.Instance object, or null if there is no component instance with the given name. If no argument was specified, the main object is returned. Description You can use the function uniface.getInstances to get a list of available DSP instances. Explain this code var vInstance = uniface.getInstance("MUSICLIST"); doSomethingWithInstance(vInstance); Copy Related Links uniface The uniface object enables you to obtain information about DSP instances. getInstanceNames() Returns an array of names of the component instances that are currently available on the browser.
